disclaimer: Flood-trigger rules are an informational interpretation of published EAP material. They do not report or determine formal EAP activation.

rules.text: Elevation 153.90 m AHD or higher and rising.

conditions.label: Storage level is at or above 153.90 m AHD
Storage level is rising

rules.text: Storage above full supply level 154.00 m AHD.

conditions.label: Storage level is above FSL 154.00 m AHD

rules.text: Storage above elevation 157.00 m AHD.

conditions.label: Storage level is above 157.00 m AHD

burdekin-falls-dam.notes: Only the published flood-operations row is used for this storage-based indication. Structural, earthquake and other hazards are not inferred.
burdekin-falls-dam.stand_down_text: Storage level 154.30 m AHD and falling, with no forecast increase in elevation.

rules.text: Lake level is at or above FSL 293.00 m AHD and the Bureau is expected to issue a relevant flood warning.

conditions.label: Lake level is at or above full supply level (293.00 m AHD)

conditions.label: Published storage is at or above 100% of the current operating capacity

conditions.label: Lake level is at or above Extreme Flood Level (296.60 m AHD)

rules.text: Stand Up 2/3 level threshold: lake level is likely to exceed 96.0 m AHD; formal escalation also depends on failure-likelihood assessment.

conditions.label: Lake level is above 96.0 m AHD
Operator engineering assessment indicates an elevated failure likelihood

lake-macdonald-dam.notes: The current EAP contains temporary cofferdam and siphon operating conditions. The indication is conservative and does not infer siphon status.
lake-macdonald-dam.stand_down_text: Below operational FSL, or no current relevant flood warning, subject to the EAP decision process.

rules.text: Reservoir is within 1 m of the current Operational FSL and flood commencement is possible; a relevant Bureau warning is expected.

rules.text: Reservoir is within 1 m of the current Operational FSL and flood commencement is likely.

conditions.label: Reservoir is within 1 m of the current Operational FSL

rules.text: Reservoir is above the applicable full supply level, or radial/sluice gate failure occurs during a flood. Wivenhoe cascade arrangements are also relevant.

conditions.label: Reservoir is above the applicable Operational FSL
Gate/cascade decision conditions are met

somerset-dam.notes: Somerset uses an Operational Full Supply Level that may be altered by regulation. Percentage full alone is not a reliable substitute for the operational elevation and flood forecast.
somerset-dam.stand_down_text: Reservoir below Operational FSL and releases have ceased.
